prompt: A dramatic visualization of digital precision degradation: ancient Roman stone columns and arches rendered in ultra-sharp photorealistic detail on the left side, gradually dissolving into visible pixel blocks and quantization artifacts toward the right side. The transition shows the architecture breaking down from crisp stone textures into blocky mosaic-like fragments. Dark moody atmosphere with deep blue and amber tones, cinematic lighting from the left casting long shadows. The concept of information loss made visual. High quality, detailed, professional photography style merging into digital abstraction.
